_comment_: Per-template Core Web Vitals budgets, applied against the worst page in each template (max, not median). Numbers are lab measurements on localhost so real-world adds network latency; tighten once GSC field data flows. Run `npm run measure:cwv -- --check` to enforce. Baseline established 2026-05-01: real numbers are far better than these limits, leaving deliberate headroom so the budget catches genuine regressions rather than firing on noise.
